subcodes.title: Some Answered Questions #026 The Second Coming of Christ and the Day of Judgement
subcodes.first_line: It is recorded in the sacred scriptures that Christ will return and that His return is conditioned upon the fulfillment of certain signs
subcodes.first_line_orig: در کتب مقدسه مذکور است که مسیح دوباره آید و بعلاماتی مشروط است
subcodes.subjects: @interpretation of words and passages in scripture, @return of Christ; second coming of Christ, @outward and inward meanings, @quotation from or interpretation of the Bible, @literal interpretation
